rule_text: Society Rule 1 for Plumbing: mandated priority Medium. Response SLA 24 hours. Escalation path: duty manager → facility head → RWA president. Penalty clause applies after SLA breach. Repeat violations within 7 days upgrade priority. Residents must allow access to utility shafts. Night curfew 22:00–06:00 applies except emergencies. Document photographic evidence before and after repair.
